name: get_document_info
description: Get detailed metadata about a specific document in the knowledge base by its path or document ID. Returns file path, size, modification time, chunk count, indexing status, and source information.

path.description: File path of the document to look up. At least one of 'path' or 'document_id' must be provided.

document_id.description: UUID of the document to look up. At least one of 'path' or 'document_id' must be provided.
